## Description

Provide a brief description of the PR's purpose here. Include screenshots or terminal outputs if relevant.

## Related Issue

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Database Schema Migration
- [ ] Documentation Update

## Checklist:

- [ ] I have read the `CONTRIBUTING.md` guidelines.
- [ ] I have run `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm lint`, and `pnpm test` successfully.
- [ ] I have verified schema changes (if any) with `pnpm db:generate`.
- [ ] I have verified the changes do not break mobile/iOS UI.
